//: Sample gateway tenant-resolution configuration. Merge the 'Gateway' section into appsettings.json (or an environment override) to change how the API host resolves the tenant of each request. Both keys are optional; the values below are the defaults. Nothing here is customer-specific — the tenant itself always arrives on the request, never in this file.

TenantResolution.//: Primary source: the request header carrying the tenant of the authenticated session.
TenantResolution.//queryFallback: Fallback source used when the header is absent (handy for links, tools and tests).
